column3: In order to undertake this quest, you must first meet the following requirements:

1. FINAL FANTASY XIV: Dawntrail must be registered to your service account.
2. You must have completed the quest “A Spellbindng Read.”
3. You must be a Disciple of War or Magic of level 100 or above. Limited jobs are not permitted.

You may now enter <Emphasis>The Merchant's Tale</Emphasis> (Advanced)!
Variant dungeons (advanced) contain no exploration, only a series of bosses from the corresponding variant dungeon.
The order of bosses is determined by the players, and each boss may be fought repeatedly until victory is achieved.
Additional information is available in the bottom left of the V&C Dungeon Finder.
